message:
feat(workflows/runner): tick 187 step execution routes through execute_step_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Tenth tick of the workflows/runner.rs strangler-fig. Closes the
last remaining call site inside run_workflow_inner's step loop.

The Workflow trait already has `execute_step_cx` (default impl
delegates to `execute_step` for backward compat; shipped in
ft-xbnl0.2.2). This tick migrates the single call site at L738
to route through `execute_step_cx(cx, ...)` when `cx` is `Some`.

Implementors who override `execute_step_cx` (none in-tree yet,
but the trait method is public for downstream crates) will
observe caller cancellation mid-step. Implementors using the
default impl receive ambient semantics (unchanged).

Migration: call site wrapped in `if let Some(cx) = cx { ... }
else { ... }` pattern with the usual cfg guards. Binding captured
in `step_outcome` let-var so the outer match expression's type
is unchanged.

Every storage-direct + Workflow-trait-visible call on
`run_workflow_inner`'s execution path now threads cx when cx
is Some. The only remaining non-cx-threaded elements are:
- 2 legacy callers (`run` L1566 + `resume_incomplete` L1741) —
  cross-crate signature change
- Lower-level helpers called from Step trait impls — those
  should be addressed at the impl's boundary if the impl
  overrides execute_step_cx

Verified via fork bypass: 31/31 workflows::runner:: tests pass.

Strangler-fig progress (final code tick for ft-xbnl0.2.3 on
workflows/runner.rs):
- ✅ 178 entry shim
- ✅ 179 engine-helper siblings
- ✅ 180 startup handshake (4 sites)
- ✅ 181 per-step cancel seam
- ✅ 182 update_execution_step (4 sites)
- ✅ 183 fail_execution (7 sites)
- ✅ 184 set_execution_waiting + complete_execution +
  mark_trigger_event_handled (12 sites)
- ✅ 185 record_workflow_terminal_action (14 sites)
- ✅ 186 check_step_idempotency (1 site)
- ✅ 187 workflow.execute_step_cx (1 site) — this

Total: 56+ cx-threaded seams across 10 ticks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
